@Java Library · v0.1.0
docker-socket
manager
Connect to Docker daemons over local Unix sockets or remote SSH tunnels.
Automatic socat relay · connection pooling · Spring Boot ready.
SSH Tunnel socat docker-java Connection Pool Maven Package
github.com/nomad4tech/docker-socket-manager
DockerBackupJob.java
// connect to remote Docker via SSH DockerSocketConfig config = DockerSocketConfig .builder() .id(1L) .type(SocketType.REMOTE_SSH) .sshHost("prod-01.example.com") .sshPrivateKeyPath("~/.ssh/id_rsa") .remoteSocatPort(2375) .build(); DockerClient client = service.getClient(1L, config); client.execCreateCmd(containerId) .withCmd("pg_dump", "-Fc", "mydb") .exec();
